The '''''Star Wars: Short Story Collection''''' is a printed booklet packaged with many [[Hasbro]] toys, published in [[July]] [[2003]]. It features three original short stories, as well as a guide to more toys. It was also given away at some conventions, and in [[October]] 2003 was made available for free downloading online.

==Contents==
*[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] Timeline
*"[[Storm Fleet Warnings]]" by [[Jude Watson]]
*"[[Equipment (short story)|Equipment]]" by [[Matthew Stover]]
*"[[Duel (short story)|Duel]]" by [[Timothy Zahn]]
